pageTitle.value: Rolex Partnerships - A common mission with Les Echos Planète

pageCaption.value: Created thanks to Rolex’s exclusive partnership with Les Echos, the “Les Echos Planète” website provides information and alerts to encourage all those who are ready to engage in protecting the planet to get involved.

WaPageTitle.value: Des solutions pour la planète - Planète Les Echos

metadescription.value: Rolex and Les Echos Planète have partnered to support projects that are dedicated to preserve our planet. Discover more on rolex.org.

previewTitle.value: Deepsea under The Pole - Planète Les Echos

text.value:
Created thanks to Rolex’s exclusive partnership with Les Echos, the “Les Echos Planète” website provides information and alerts to encourage all those who are ready to engage in protecting the planet to get involved.

Driven by a desire to educate, this editorial project offers readers verified and comprehensive reference points to improve their understanding of environmental issues, as well as reports on initiatives that provide responses to these challenges.

pageTitle.value: Rolex Partnerships - Preventing whale shark extinction

pageCaption.value: The world-renowned Australian scientist is working hard to discover the secrets of the world's largest fish and prevent its disappearance.

WaPageTitle.value: Brad Norman, the whale shark champion

metadescription.value: Marine scientist Brad Norman's innovative methodology tracks the whale sharks' skin markings to prevent their extinction. Learn more on rolex.org.

previewTitle.value: Brad Norman, the whale shark champion

pageTitle.value: Rolex Partnerships - Saving the snow leopard

pageCaption.value: The world-renowned biologist is entirely devoted to the preservation of these rare felines, whose territory covers 12 countries. A life's work that combines scientific discoveries and cooperation with the peoples of the mountains.

WaPageTitle.value: Rodney Jackson dances with snow leopards

metadescription.value: Biologist Rodney Jackson has devoted his life’s work to preserve snow leopards living in the rural mountain areas of Asia. Discover more on rolex.org.

previewTitle.value: Rodney Jackson dances with snow leopards

pageCaption.value: For more than 20 years, the marine biologist has been carrying out her unique work of detecting and preserving new species of coral in the fjords of Chile.

WaPageTitle.value: A life working for Patagonian biodiversity

metadescription.value: Marine biologist Vreni Häussermann has dedicated decades of her life to save Patagonian biodiversity and its unique species. More on rolex.org.

previewTitle.value: A life working for Patagonian biodiversity

pageTitle.value: Rolex Partnerships - Hunting ice to combat global warming

pageCaption.value: Mapping and analysing the huge microbial system that is colonising glacial expanses and warming the planet, the young scientist’s research has attracted worldwide attention.

metadescription.value: Scientist Joseph Cook's research on glacial microbiology supports the initiatives to reduce global warming. More on rolex.org.

previewTitle.value: Joseph Cook, The living ice hunter

pageTitle.value: Rolex Partnerships - Protecting the giant manta ray

pageCaption.value: In northern Peru, the biologist educates local communities to preserve the wealth of the ocean, enlisting thousands of people to join the fight.

WaPageTitle.value: Struggle To Protect Giant Manta Rays

metadescription.value: In her mission to save the endangered manta ray, biologist Kerstin Forsberg educates locals on how to protect the ocean. More on rolex.org.

previewTitle.value: Struggle to protect giant manta rays

pageTitle.value: Rolex Partnerships -  Using bio-acoustics to protect species

pageCaption.value: The research and technological innovations developed by the bio-acoustician are used to assess the degree of noise pollution that affects the planet, and to take action.

WaPageTitle.value: Listen to the world to save endangered species

metadescription.value: Bio-acoustician Michel André's technological innovation helps to take action in saving endangered species. More on rolex.org.

previewTitle.value: Listening to the world to save endangered species

pageTitle.value: Rolex Partnerships - Sustainable solution against poverty

pageCaption.value: In the Philippines, the president of Rags2Riches is taking women out of poverty by creating useful and desirable objects with recycled materials.

WaPageTitle.value: Offering a sustainable future to Filipino craftswomen

metadescription.value: Reese Fernandez-Ruiz's initiative addresses both environmental challenges and poverty amongst craftswomen in the Philippines. More on rolex.org.

previewTitle.value: Offering a sustainable future to Filipino craftswomen

pageCaption.value: The Under The Pole exhibitions explore the “twilight zone” at ocean depths of between 60 and 150 metres and contribute to the major scientific discoveries that will determine the future of our planet.

metadescription.value: The Under The Pole expeditions are contributing to major discoveries that will determine the future of our planet. Find out how on rolex.org.
